name: @oscharko-dev/ti-agentic-harness
description: Adversarial critic agents, formal verification, causal hypothesis registry, lessons memdir.

scripts.build: tsc -b && cp -r src/adversarial-playbooks dist/adversarial-playbooks && cp -r src/formal-verification dist/formal-verification
scripts.test: tsx --test src/action-topology-agent.test.ts src/adversarial-critic-agent.test.ts src/adversarial-gap-finder.test.ts src/agent-harness-checkpoint.test.ts src/agent-harness.test.ts src/agent-lessons-memdir.test.ts src/case-merger.test.ts src/causal-hypothesis-registry.test.ts src/formal-verification.test.ts src/lessons-consolidation-lock.test.ts src/test-data-oracle.test.ts
